prompt: The board is connected, but your hand blocks enough improvement and can still pressure weaker continues. Choose the best action.
why_v1: Connected boards do not always force passivity; when your edge is strong enough, raising still protects value.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. This connected-board read still supports a protection raise.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Start from the connected texture, then notice when the edge is strong enough to raise.
